title: Engineering Foundations
description: Began Computer Science studies at Cracow University of Technology. Building strong foundations in OOP, algorithms, SQL databases, and working across Windows/Linux (WSL) environments.

title: Backend & Architecture
description: Deep dive into the .NET ecosystem. Built desktop apps (WPF/MVVM) and developed ASP.NET Core REST APIs, using Postman for endpoint testing. Also explored Java through academic projects.

title: The Fullstack Pivot
description: Expanded my stack to modern frontend and DevOps. Certified in Responsive Web Design, Advanced JS, Docker, and Kubernetes.

title: Ready to Build
description: Seeking my first commercial role as a Junior Developer or Intern to bring my dedication, problem-solving mindset, and skills to a real-world development team.
